title: KeyEvent
description: Envelope dispatched by FocusManager to the focused RenderNode for keyboard input. `channel` is the input channel of the key — compare it with the `Keyboard` constants (e.g. `event.channel === Keyboard.Enter`). A handler may call KeyEvent.preventDefault to suppress the FocusManager's built-in handling for this key (currently `Tab` focus traversal), letting the focused widget consume the key itself.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Envelope dispatched by FocusManager to the focused RenderNode for keyboard input. `channel` is the input channel of the key — compare it with the `Keyboard` constants (e.g. `event.channel === Keyboard.Enter`).
A handler may call KeyEvent.preventDefault to suppress the FocusManager's built-in handling for this key (currently `Tab` focus traversal), letting the focused widget consume the key itself.

members.name: new
members.signature: new(type: KeyEventType, channel: number, target: RenderNode): KeyEvent

members.name: preventDefault
members.description: Suppress the FocusManager's built-in handling (e.g. Tab traversal) for this key.

members.name: channel
members.description: Input channel of the key — compare with the Keyboard.* channel constants.

members.name: target
members.description: The focused node this event was delivered to.
